Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course "Urban Design" is the core subject of this goal, explicitly covering "urban renewal", "urban planning", and "sustainable city" (永續都市), aligning with Targets 11.1, 11.3, 11.7.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The focus on "sustainable city" (永續都市) implies principles of resource efficiency and waste reduction, which are central to Targets 12.2 and 12.5.
